pages.title: Core Controls
pages.text: Your RPG surfaces live on simple keys:$(br2)$(gold)K$() - Ascendant Web (skills)$(br)$(gold)L$() - Quest Log$(br)$(gold)R$() - Spell wheel$(br)$(gold)V$() - Cast spell$(br)$(gold)Z$() - Combat roll (dodge)

pages.title: More Keys
pages.text: $(gold)Left Alt$() - Spell-bar modifier$(br)$(gold)B$() - Backpack$(br)$(gold)G$() - Curios (trinkets)$(br)$(gold)U$() - Waypoints (Xaero)$(br)$(gold)Y$() - Minimap settings$(br2)$(soft)Movement, inventory and attack keep their vanilla keys.$()

pages.title: Recipe Lookup (JEI)
pages.text: $(rune)JEI$() answers 'how do I get this?'$(br2)$(gold)Ctrl+R$() - how to $(em)craft$() the hovered item$(br)$(gold)Ctrl+U$() - what it is $(em)used for$()$(br2)$(soft)Hover any item, then press the key.$()
